creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to VVD from comment #4)
The security update is ready, but I wanted not to commit it, before the grpc problem is not fix.
Even if I do not really accept having a new grpc port (as the problem in grpc will also cause problems with other software) I currently test the patch.
After it is committed, I will commit the security upgrade for gitlab.
